cases.title: Scenario matrix row for manual correction governance after edit window expiration
preconditions: Testing-plan §3 Manual correction governance block applies (FR-20, FR-21, BR-14/15/16, AC-13, AC-14).
Closed session exists with enrolled student AttendanceRecord status Absent from close-time finalization.
Effective policy manualEditWindow has elapsed since session closedAt timestamp.
Assigned Lecturer and AcademicAdmin bearer tokens are available for the class section.
steps: Authenticate as assigned Lecturer for the session class section.
Submit PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and documented reason after window expiry.
Verify AttendanceRecord and audit_logs remain unchanged for the lecturer attempt.
Authenticate as AcademicAdmin with institution scope covering the section.
Submit PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present, reason, and Idempotency-Key as admin override path per BR-16.
Query AttendanceRecord and AuditLog for the student-session pair.
cases.expected: Lecturer correction after window is rejected or escalated per AC-14 coverage row and BR-15; no lecturer-side attendance mutation or audit write occurs; AcademicAdmin override succeeds when policy permits, updating AttendanceRecord with checkInMethod Admin Correction and full audit entry per BR-16.

cases.title: Attendance ledger service rejects lecturer correction when edit window expired at DB boundary
preconditions: Real database transaction is enabled for attendance ledger and policy resolution modules.
Closed session exists with enrolled student AttendanceRecord status Absent.
Effective policy manualEditWindowHours is configured; fixture clock or closedAt places current time beyond window end.
Assigned Lecturer is in scope for the class section per PRM-01.
steps: Capture beforeState: AttendanceRecord status Absent, checkInMethod system-assigned, audit_logs count for target mutation.
Invoke PATCH attendance correction through application service as Lecturer with status Manual Present and reason.
Query attendance_records and audit_logs tables for target studentUserId and classSessionId.
Verify policy resolution module evaluated manualEditWindow against session closedAt.
cases.expected: Service layer rejects correction with EditWindowExpired domain error; single transaction rolls back or short-circuits without AttendanceRecord mutation; no new audit_logs row is written for the rejected lecturer attempt; beforeState Absent is preserved per BR-15.

cases.title: SM-03 AttendanceRecord remains Absent when lecturer correction attempted after edit window
preconditions: Closed class session exists in integration test database with SM-01 state Closed.
Enrolled student has AttendanceRecord in Absent state from close-time finalization (BR-13).
manualEditWindow from effective policy has elapsed; assigned Lecturer is in scope.
steps: Capture beforeState: AttendanceRecord status Absent; session state Closed.
Execute lecturer manual correction command with allowed status Manual Present and required reason.
Capture afterState for AttendanceRecord and verify no AttendanceCorrected event is emitted.
Execute AcademicAdmin override correction for same student-session as alternate path.
Capture afterState following admin command.
cases.expected: beforeState Absent is unchanged after expired-window lecturer attempt per BR-15; session remains Closed with no illegal SM-01 transitions; admin override path transitions afterState to Manual Present with checkInMethod Admin Correction per BR-16 when institution policy allows.

cases.title: PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} returns 409 EditWindowExpired after manual edit window
preconditions: Assigned Lecturer is authenticated with bearer token.
Closed session exists with student AttendanceRecord status Absent.
manualEditWindow from effective policy has elapsed since session closedAt.
Lecturer is assigned to the session class section.
steps: Lecturer calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with body {"status": "Manual Present", "reason": "Sinh vien co mat nhung loi camera tren thiet bi."} and Idempotency-Key header.
Inspect HTTP status 409, response envelope error.code EditWindowExpired, and data is null.
Call GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance and locate the student row.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs filtered by targetId for manual attendance update from this lecturer attempt.
cases.expected: PATCH returns 409 with standard envelope and error.code EditWindowExpired per API design; roster row remains attendanceStatus Absent; no audit entry is written for the rejected lecturer correction attempt.

cases.title: Primary workflow lecturer manual correction blocked after edit window expiration
preconditions: Lecturer opens and closes session for assigned section (AC-01, AC-05).
Session close assigns Absent to enrolled student without successful check-in (AC-12).
Fixture advances clock or seeds closedAt so manualEditWindow from effective policy is expired.
Lecturer bearer token is available.
steps: Lecturer reviews GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance showing student Absent.
Lecturer submits PATCH correction to Manual Present with documented reason after in-person verification.
Inspect API response for EditWindowExpired rejection.
Lecturer refreshes roster via GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs for any manual correction event from this lecturer attempt.
cases.expected: End-to-end AC-14 primary path completes: lecturer correction after window expiration is rejected with EditWindowExpired; student status remains Absent; no audit record is created for the failed lecturer mutation per BR-15.

cases.title: Alternate branch AcademicAdmin override succeeds after lecturer edit window expired
preconditions: Closed session with Absent student exists; manualEditWindow has elapsed.
Assigned Lecturer PATCH attempt returns 409 EditWindowExpired (control).
AcademicAdmin bearer token has institution scope covering the class section.
Institution policy allows admin override of lecturer time limits per BR-16.
steps: Confirm lecturer PATCH correction is rejected with EditWindowExpired.
AcademicAdmin calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present, documented reason, and Idempotency-Key.
Inspect HTTP 200 response envelope and roster via GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs for admin correction event with oldStatus Absent and newStatus Manual Present.
cases.expected: Admin override path succeeds after lecturer window expiry: AttendanceRecord updates to Manual Present with checkInMethod Admin Correction; audit entry records actor AcademicAdmin, reason, old/new status, and timestamp per BR-16 and BR-22.

cases.title: Flow C audit verification after admin override following expired lecturer window
preconditions: Closed session with Absent student exists; manualEditWindow elapsed.
Lecturer correction attempt rejected with EditWindowExpired.
AcademicAdmin performs override correction changing status to Excused with documented reason.
Audit query endpoint is available to SystemAuditor read scope.
steps: Record roster status before admin correction via GET /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance.
AcademicAdmin applies PATCH correction with status Excused and reason documenting post-window dispute resolution.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs with filters targetType AttendanceRecord, targetId, and time range covering correction.
Verify audit payload includes escalated admin override context per CMP-01 minimum fields.
cases.expected: Committed admin override has corresponding audit record with actor, role AcademicAdmin, target student/session, old status Absent, new status Excused, reason, and timestamp; audit captures admin bypass of BR-15 window limit per BR-16 and AC-19 alignment.

cases.title: Lecturer PATCH at exact edit-window boundary returns EditWindowExpired and preserves Absent record
preconditions: Closed session with Absent student exists; assigned Lecturer is in scope.
Effective policy manualEditWindowHours is known; fixture positions current time at first instant after window expiry.
Lecturer bearer token is authenticated.
steps: Verify control: at one instant before boundary, PATCH with reason succeeds (AC-13 alignment) or fixture confirms window was active.
Advance clock to first instant after manualEditWindow end relative to session closedAt.
Call PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and valid reason.
Inspect HTTP status and error.code; query AttendanceRecord state.
cases.expected: Request at first instant after window expiry is rejected with 409 EditWindowExpired per VR-MC-03; AttendanceRecord remains Absent; boundary enforces BR-15 without off-by-one acceptance past policy limit.

cases.title: Student and SystemAuditor denied PATCH correction; expired-window Lecturer receives EditWindowExpired not success
preconditions: Closed session in section A with Absent student; manualEditWindow has elapsed.
Student and SystemAuditor bearer tokens and assigned Lecturer token for section A are available.
AcademicAdmin token is available as authorized override control.
steps: Student calls PATCH /v1/class-sessions/{sessionId}/attendance/{studentUserId} with status Manual Present and reason.
SystemAuditor calls the same PATCH for the section A session.
Assigned Lecturer (section A, window expired) calls the same PATCH with status Manual Present and reason.
Verify AttendanceRecord state after denied and expired-window attempts.
AcademicAdmin calls PATCH override as control.
cases.expected: Student and SystemAuditor receive 403 Forbidden per permission matrix without attendance mutation; expired-window Lecturer receives 409 EditWindowExpired (not 403 OutOfScope) because actor is in scope but window elapsed per PRM-06; no audit write from denied roles; AcademicAdmin control succeeds per BR-16.

cases.title: Lecturer ManualCorrectionDialog shows escalation guidance when edit window expired on PG-06
preconditions: Lecturer is authenticated on desktop browser (PG-06 live roster view) for assigned section.
Closed session displays student row with Absent danger badge.
manualEditWindow from effective policy has elapsed since session close.
ManualCorrectionDialog window guard is enabled per domain component spec.
steps: Navigate to /lecturer/sessions/{id}/roster and locate Absent student row.
Open ManualCorrectionDialog from row action; observe window guard or pre-submit state.
Select Manual Present in status dropdown and enter reason in labeled Lý do textarea.
Attempt dialog submit and observe API error mapping.
Verify escalation guidance directs lecturer to request Academic Admin action per FLOW-08 step 6.
Confirm roster row remains Absent badge and dialog does not falsely show success.
cases.expected: Browser FLOW-08 expired-window branch completes: submit surfaces EditWindowExpired mapped to escalation guidance to admin rather than raw error; roster row remains Absent; no false success badge; UI aligns with API rejection per AC-14 and FRM-08.

cases.title: GET /v1/audit-logs pagination returns admin override entries after expired lecturer window across page boundaries
preconditions: dispute-trail fixture includes at least 30 admin override correction audit entries where lecturer window had expired.
AcademicAdmin bearer token is authenticated within institution scope.
Each admin correction records actor, old status, new status, reason, and occurredAt after lecturer EditWindowExpired rejection.
steps: Query GET /v1/audit-logs?targetType=AttendanceRecord&actionType=admin_override&classSectionId={sectionId}&page=1&pageSize=25.
Verify HTTP 200, meta.pagination page=1, pageSize=25, totalItems >= 30, and totalPages >= 2.
Record audit entry IDs from page 1 and verify each row includes actor, oldStatus, newStatus, reason, and occurredAt.
Query GET /v1/audit-logs with same filters and page=2.
Verify page 2 returns distinct IDs with no overlap against page 1.
cases.expected: Paginated audit query honors page and pageSize invariants; admin override audit rows from post-window escalation path are queryable across pages with full CMP-01 fields; totalItems reflects only authorized-scope events without cross-scope count leakage.
